---
title: "Estimated Latent Scores and Sum Scores"
format: html
editor: visual
---

Welcome to my visualization site. Below you can play around with different conditions to see how different scoring strategies for latent variables perform to recover structural parameters.

<iframe src="https://tonatiuhxotl.shinyapps.io/scoringmethods251/" width="100%" height="700px" style="border: none; border-radius: 5px; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);" allow="fullscreen" loading="lazy">

</iframe>

References:
